protein_name: Required for checkpoint signaling after DNA damage. Required for ATR expression, possibly by stabilizing the protein. Belongs to the ATRIP family. Ubiquitous. 4 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Protein type: Cell cycle regulation; DNA repair, damage; DNA-binding
raw_fields.Molecular Function: K63-linked polyubiquitin modification-dependent protein binding; protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: DNA damage checkpoint signaling; DNA damage response; DNA repair; nucleobase-containing compound metabolic process; regulation of double-strand break repair
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: AGS1; ATM and Rad3-related-interacting protein; ATR interacting protein; ATR-interacting protein; ATRIP; DKFZp762J2115; FLJ12343; MGC20625; MGC21482; MGC26740
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 5.9 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
